item.name: LST-LST-LSG-PROJECT-SCOPED-OK — List listeners project-scoped (no loadBalancerId filter) → 200 + listeners array (KAC-229 project-scope parity). Technique: ECP (valid project-scoped list class)

LST-LST-PAGE-TOKEN-GARBAGE — List listeners with garbage pageToken → 400 InvalidArgument (validated before listauthz empty-grant short-circuit). Techniques: ECP (garbage-token class) + error-guessing (pagination-validate-before-authz ordering)
LST-LST-BVA-PAGESIZE-1001 — List listeners with pageSize=1001 (off-by-one over max) → 400 InvalidArgument (validated before empty-grant short-circuit). Technique: BVA (max+1)
LST-LST-BVA-PAGESIZE-1000 — List listeners with pageSize=1000 (max upper bound) → 200. Technique: BVA (max)
LST-LST-BVA-PAGESIZE-ZERO — List listeners with pageSize=0 → 200 (server default applied). Techniques: BVA (0→default) + ECP (unset-size class)
LST-LST-PAGE-TOKEN-EMPTY — List listeners with pageToken="" → 200 (empty token = first page). Technique: BVA (empty-string token boundary)
LST-LST-BVA-PAGESIZE-NEGATIVE — List listeners with pageSize=-1 → rejected (400) or coerced to default (200). Technique: BVA (min-1 / below-range) — mirrors NLB-LST-BVA-PAGESIZE-NEGATIVE

LST-UPD-NEG-INVALID-ID-PREFIX — Update listener with malformed id prefix → InvalidArgument (format-check first statement). Techniques: ECP (malformed-id class) + error-guessing (sync-format reject before repo.Get)
LST-DEL-NEG-INVALID-ID-PREFIX — Delete listener with malformed id prefix → InvalidArgument (format-check first statement). Techniques: ECP (malformed-id class) + error-guessing
LST-UPD-NEG-NF-UNKNOWN — Update well-formed-but-absent listener id → rejected (NotFound / authz-first). Techniques: ECP (absent-id class) + error-guessing (authz-vs-existence ordering)
